name: Beef & Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 BONELESS BEEF (Flank steak, top sirloin, or tenderloin), sliced across grain into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl and mix beef with the marinade. Marinate for 30 minutes.
2. Heat a wok over the highest heat. When hot, swirl in 2 tablespoons peanut oil.
3. Add ginger and salt, and toss for a few seconds.
4. Add broccoli and stir-fry for one minute.
5. Add water, turn the heat to medium-high, cover, and steam until crisp-tender.
6. Uncover and turn the heat to high. Stir-fry until the water is evaporated.
7. Remove broccoli and reserve it.
8. Reheat the same wok (without rinsing) and, when hot, add the remaining peanut oil.
9. Add beef slices and stir-fry until lightly browned but not cooked through. Press slices against the sides of the wok to sear; do not stir-fry too vigorously.
10. Add broccoli to the wok and toss.
11. When hot, stir in the seasoning sauce and continue stirring until the sauce thickens. It's a good idea to whisk the sauce just before adding it to the wok.
12. Turn onto a serving platter and drizzle with sesame oil. The sugar in the marinade and seasoning sauce acts as a floor enhancer rather than a sweetener. Enjoy!
